name: ai_era_symbolic
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A vintage-styled terminal screen outline with rigid if-then decision tree branches inside, drawn in geometric electric blue lines. Small amber nodes at each decision point. Represents rule-based expert systems of early AI. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 16:9 aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
